title: Unibond No More Nails Removable Picture Hanging Strips, Adhesive Strips for Fast, Easy Mounting, Double Sided Sticky Tape for Interior Use, Translucent Tape, Pack of 10 , Yellow
features: Multi-purpose – The versatile double-sided adhesive tape offers high-strength adhesion. The hanging strips are designed to complete jobs anywhere around the house
Versatile use – The practical mounting tape strips are ideal for a range of uses including mounting hooks, signs, numbers, pictures, car number plates etc
High-strength – The hanging strips are able to hold up to 2kg per strip and are ideal for use on wood, ceramic, tiles, metal, brick, stone and most plastics
Easy to remove - The innovative stretch release technology of the adhesive tape leaves no damage on walls. When desired, just twist to remove the strips without a trace
Package Contents – Unibond No More Nails Strips - Removable, strong double-sided tape for mounting jobs inside the home, for most materials*, holds up to 2kg, translucent, white, Pack of 10
description: From the manufacturer About UniBond In the UK and the ROI, UniBond offers a wide range of DIY products – Grab Adhesives, Sealants and Tile Adhesives. By offering guidance and smart total bonding solutions, it simplifies every kind of DIY job both inside and outside the house. UniBond No More Nails - Removable Strips Eliminate the Need for Nails and Screws in Your Walls! UniBond No More Nails - Removable Strips are convenient pre-cut 20mm x 40mm strips of double-sided mounting tape ideal for removable indoor mounting of picture frames, signs, hooks, and bathroom & kitchen fixtures. Bonds to metal, wood, ceramic, stones, tiles, glass and plastic. No need for the mess of liquid adhesive, cartridge guns or drills! The tape is highly versatile and durable, supporting up to 2kg per strip** whilst also being easy to remove. Versatile strips that are easy to remove after fixing. Ideal for mounting household objects No need for nails, screws, drills or cartridge guns *Suitable for use on many different materials Format: 5 or 10 x 20mm x 40mm white foam strips with yellow liner **Maximum holding power: 2kg per strip under ideal conditions. i.e. mounting smooth flat objects less than 10 mm thick to metal Temperature tolerance after application: -20°C to +90°C *For interior use only. Not suitable for PE, PP, PTFE, mirrors, wallpaper, shelves, overhead items, textured, fibrous, dusty, unsound surfaces Mounting jobs done in seconds! Step 1 : Only apply to clean, dry, smooth, flat surfaces at least 20 mm wide. Apply above +18°C. Do not touch the adhesives or surface to which strips are to be applied. In the case of a painted wall, ensure the paint is well bonded to the wall. Step 2 : Apply strips evenly, 15cm apart, to the verticle sides of the object and press down firmly for at least 5 seconds. Remove the yellow liner. Apply the item to the surface pressing firmly for at least 30 seconds. Step 3 : Maximum adhesion is reached after 24 hours. Do not load hooks and hangers for at least 24 hours. Store the remaining strips in the packaging in a dry place between +10°C and +30°C. How to remove : Split strips by drawing a strong thread behind the mounted object. Care should be taken when removing breakable items. The remaining foam can then be peeled off. High strength strips for simple household mounting jobs! UniBond No More Nails - Removable Strips offer a simple solution for lightweight household mounting jobs on a variety of building materials*. The pre-cut strips are convenient and hassle-free, whilst their removable nature gives you the freedom to change your mind.
